metadata.title: Premium Long Haul Airline Data Assets
metadata.description: Starter catalog of key business, PII, and security-sensitive data assets for the Premium Long Haul Airline domain.

assets.name: Customer Profile
assets.description: Core customer account, profile, and preference data used across domain journeys.
assets.accessScope: customer-facing journeys and approved internal operations
assets.businessMeaning: Core customer account, profile, and preference data used across domain journeys.

assets.name: Customer Contact Point
assets.description: Verified email, phone, and contactability state used for messaging and recovery.
assets.businessMeaning: Verified email, phone, and contactability state used for messaging and recovery.

interfaces.name: customer-contact-point api
interfaces.description: Access interface for Customer Contact Point.

assets.name: Consent Record
assets.description: Privacy, tracking, and communication consent history with auditable decisions.
assets.businessMeaning: Privacy, tracking, and communication consent history with auditable decisions.

assets.name: Identity Credential
assets.description: Credential metadata, password hashes, or authentication factor references.
assets.businessMeaning: Credential metadata, password hashes, or authentication factor references.

assets.name: Session Token
assets.description: Short-lived authenticated session state, refresh metadata, and revocation information.
assets.businessMeaning: Short-lived authenticated session state, refresh metadata, and revocation information.

assets.name: Access Policy
assets.description: Authorization rules, entitlements, restrictions, and access guardrails.
assets.businessMeaning: Authorization rules, entitlements, restrictions, and access guardrails.

assets.name: Audit Log
assets.description: Security and compliance event trail for sensitive operations and lifecycle changes.
assets.businessMeaning: Security and compliance event trail for sensitive operations and lifecycle changes.

assets.name: Payment Instrument Reference
assets.description: Tokenized payment method references or vaulted instrument links used in protected commerce flows.
assets.businessMeaning: Tokenized payment method references or vaulted instrument links used in protected commerce flows.

interfaces.name: payment-instrument-reference api
interfaces.description: Access interface for Payment Instrument Reference.

governance.sharingPolicy: approved payment and finance usage only

assets.name: Transaction
assets.description: Commercial or financial transaction state tracked across purchase, settlement, or payout workflows.
assets.businessMeaning: Commercial or financial transaction state tracked across purchase, settlement, or payout workflows.

governance.sharingPolicy: approved payment and finance usage only

assets.name: Offer Pricing Availability
assets.description: Builds the governed flight offer layer across schedules, cabins, fares, and inventory availability.
assets.businessMeaning: Reusable domain data centered on Offer, Pricing & Availability.

interfaces.name: offer-pricing-availability api
interfaces.description: Access interface for Offer Pricing Availability.

governance.sharingPolicy: internal and approved domain consumers only

assets.name: Ancillary Seat Upgrade Merchandising
assets.description: Monetizes seats, bags, lounges, upgrades, and premium extras throughout the booking and servicing journey.
assets.businessMeaning: Reusable domain data centered on Ancillary, Seat & Upgrade Merchandising.

interfaces.name: ancillary-seat-upgrade-merchandising api
interfaces.description: Access interface for Ancillary Seat Upgrade Merchandising.

governance.sharingPolicy: internal and approved domain consumers only

assets.name: Order Servicing Ticket Lifecycle
assets.description: Owns booking creation, post-booking changes, cancellations, ticketing states, and refund-related order flows.
assets.businessMeaning: Reusable domain data centered on Order Servicing & Ticket Lifecycle.

interfaces.name: order-servicing-ticket-lifecycle api
interfaces.description: Access interface for Order Servicing Ticket Lifecycle.

governance.sharingPolicy: internal and approved domain consumers only

assets.name: Identity Profile Document Readiness
assets.description: Connects traveller identity, profile data, contact preferences, and travel-readiness information to every journey.
assets.businessMeaning: Reusable domain data centered on Identity, Profile & Document Readiness.

interfaces.name: identity-profile-document-readiness api
interfaces.description: Access interface for Identity Profile Document Readiness.

governance.sharingPolicy: internal and approved domain consumers only

assets.name: Corporate Agency Ndc Distribution
assets.description: Controls commercial content, contract logic, and servicing pathways across indirect and managed-travel channels.
assets.businessMeaning: Reusable domain data centered on Corporate, Agency & NDC Distribution.

interfaces.name: corporate-agency-ndc-distribution api
interfaces.description: Access interface for Corporate Agency Ndc Distribution.

governance.sharingPolicy: internal and approved domain consumers only

assets.name: Payments Refunds Revenue Settlement
assets.description: Runs collection, refund, reconciliation, and settlement across passenger, holiday, and cargo transactions.
assets.businessMeaning: Reusable domain data centered on Payments, Refunds & Revenue Settlement.

interfaces.name: payments-refunds-revenue-settlement api
interfaces.description: Access interface for Payments Refunds Revenue Settlement.

governance.sharingPolicy: internal and approved domain consumers only

assets.name: Cargo Capacity Quote Booking
assets.description: Owns cargo quoting, product selection, booking, and commercial control across the long-haul network.
assets.businessMeaning: Reusable domain data centered on Cargo Capacity, Quote & Booking.

interfaces.name: cargo-capacity-quote-booking api
interfaces.description: Access interface for Cargo Capacity Quote Booking.

governance.sharingPolicy: internal and approved domain consumers only

assets.name: Integration Event Backbone
assets.description: Provides the shared eventing, API mediation, and integration patterns required across airline products.
assets.businessMeaning: Reusable domain data centered on Integration & Event Backbone.

interfaces.name: integration-event-backbone api
interfaces.description: Access interface for Integration Event Backbone.

governance.sharingPolicy: internal and approved domain consumers only
